headline: Halozyme (HALO) Rated Buy on Strong Royalty Growth
summary: Halozyme Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:HALO) ranks among the most profitable biotech stocks to buy now. On April 13, TD Cowen reaffirmed its Buy rating and $96 price target for Halozyme Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:HALO). The firm forecasts Halozyme to continue to outperform expectations and enhance guidance due to strong growth catalysts such as Vyvgart Hytrulo, Darzalex Faspro, […]

headline: Vertex (VRTX) Named Top Biotech Pick for 2026 by BofA
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated (NASDAQ:VRTX) ranks among the most profitable biotech stocks to buy now. On April 13, Bank of America reiterated Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated (NASDAQ:VRTX) as a top large-cap biotech pick for 2026, with a $598 price objective.
